title: Changing the writing direction to be from right to left when writing a reply to an update
excerpt: As a Hebrew speaker, I write from right to left. my whole organization does. In the update section of each item, when writing a new update, there is an option to change the writing direction from right to left and otherw…

posts.author: ItaiWeiser (Itai Weiser)
posts.cookedHtml: As a Hebrew speaker, I write from right to left. my whole organization does. In the update section of each item, when writing a new update, there is an option to change the writing direction from right to left and otherwise (a simbol of two opposite arrows) and it works good. The problem starts when ones trying to reply to a new update. when replying the deafult writing direction is from left to right and there is no button to change that. there is an option after I wrote the reply and before I send it, to marker the text of my reply, right clicking it, which opens a few option where one of the options is to change to writing direction, so I change it and the text really does change it’s direction from right to left, but as soon as I press enter to send my reply it automatically change the writing direction back to be from left to right. It is extremly not convenient. I already told you guys about this problem a few weeks ago and nothing changed. Please help me make it happen. Monday is an Israeli startup, one of its higher priorities should be to make the Israeli Hebrew speakers happy costumers…
